images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model posing as a rock band guitarist inside a vintage subway car. She has flawless, realistic skin with subtle pores and fine vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, a slim waist, ample chest, and straight, silky black hair. She wears a form‑fitting, breathable navy sport bra and high‑waist black yoga pants with a subtle sheen, the fabrics clinging to her curves. The blue‑hour lighting floods the carriage, delivering a bright, clear ambience with gentle reflections and no heavy shadows. She sticks her tongue out playfully, a slight smile on her lips, eyes meeting the lens as if sharing a secret. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field creates a soft bokeh, while global illumination and ray tracing render the scene with cinematic precision. The palette is desaturated, muted vintage tones that evoke nostalgic calm.8k photo, Large breasts
